name: Cast & Spell
short_description: Cast & Spell is an action-packed multiplayer game where wizards battle using elemental magic. Fight in PvP duels or team up with friends in co-op modes to defeat monsters. Master different elements and enjoy intense, strategic combat across various game modes.
detailed_description:
3-step spell casting!

Each spell is chosen in 3 steps: spell type, spell element and the spell itself.

Each element has a weakness for the other. If you want to be a strong mage, choose your spells wisely!


35+ unique spells!


About the Game

Cast & Spell is an exhilarating multiplayer game where players engage in epic battles as powerful wizards, wielding the elements of nature to dominate their opponents. Enter a world where you can command the forces of fire, frost, stone, lightning, water, and life, casting a wide range of spells to outsmart and overpower your enemies in thrilling combat.

In Cast & Spell, you can go head-to-head with other players in intense PvP duels, using strategy and mastery of different elemental combinations to emerge victorious. Prefer teamwork? Join forces with your friends in cooperative PvE modes, where you'll face hordes of monstrous creatures across diverse environments. From fast-paced skirmishes to tactical survival challenges, there's a mode for every kind of mage.

supported_languages: English, German, Korean, Russian, Japanese, French, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Polish, Ukrainian
